page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8is-8x.32xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at 3.3 GHz. The system provides 128 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, delivering 128 vCPUs. This CPU configuration is paired with 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

The instance is equipped with eight NVIDIA L20 GPUs from the Ada Lovelace family, providing a combined total of 384 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps, facilitating rapid data transfer between the instance and external storage or other network resources.

Given the high density of GPU accelerators and substantial system memory, this instance is designed for workloads requiring massive parallel processing capabilities. It is suited for deep learning training, large-scale AI inference, high-performance computing, and complex data science tasks. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the hardware profile represents a high-density resource allocation where the lack of local storage is traded off for substantial GPU and network bandwidth resources.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8is-8x.32xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance designed for high-performance computing and parallel processing workloads. Running on the KVM hypervisor, it features an Intel Xeon 6462C x86_64 processor with 128 dedicated physical cores operating at 3.3 GHz. The instance is configured with 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. Acceleration is driven by eight NVIDIA L20 Ada Lovelace GPUs, delivering a total of 384 GB of VRAM. While the instance lacks local storage, it offers a high-speed baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps to support external storage integration. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for demanding workloads such as deep learning, artificial intelligence inference, and large-scale data science operations.

tagline: A high-density GPU acceleration platform featuring eight NVIDIA L20 GPUs, 128 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, and 100 Gbps network bandwidth.

128 dedicated Intel Xeon 6462C physical cores running at 3.3 GHz
1024 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
100 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-speed data transfer
KVM hypervisor architecture with zero local storage
Optimized for deep learning, AI inference, and parallel computing
